authRedirectHelp: Taking too long? Click here to redirect.
authChooseAccount: Choose an account for this session.
authFailedDescription: We couldn’t finish signing you in. Try again and we’ll bring you back here.
authOrganizationsFailed: Signed in, but organizations didn’t load
authSignInDescription: Sign in or create your account to access GainForest.
authCodeHelp: We’ll send you a sign-in code
authSaveWork: Save your project sites, tree information, and Certs in one place.
bumicertDonationPublic: Completed donations appear publicly so supporters can see the impact.
bumicertNoDescription: No long-form description has been published for this Cert yet.
bumicertEvidenceOpen: Evidence and reviews live on the open ATProto network and can be inspected by anyone.
bumicertNoComments: No public comments yet. Comments posted on this claim from the wider network — including reviews by Simocracy AI sims — will appear here.
bumicertReviewsNote: Reviews are independent records on their authors’ accounts; they are shown here unedited.
donateReceiptNote: Recorded as a public donation receipt anyone can audit.
donateProfileNote: Leave this off to show this donation on your GainForest profile.
donateAnonymousNote: You are not signed in, so this donation will appear as anonymous.
donateWalletNotice: Your wallet will ask you to approve the donation. Any network fee is covered for you, and the completed donation will be shown publicly.
donateConfirmDescription: Review your donation before approving it.
donateInsufficient: Your wallet does not have enough USDC for this donation.
timelineLinksFailed: Existing timeline links could not be checked. Refresh before adding tree groups.
timelineReview: Review files, field notes, tree information, sounds, and map layers already added to this public timeline.
timelineEmpty: Reports, field notes, and saved project information from this organization will appear here.
timelinePreviewTrees: Preview tree groups linked to this timeline.
timelineSelectItems: Select items to link to this timeline.
timelineFileHelp: Photos, sounds, videos, reports, and notes up to 4 MB.
createDescription: Turn field work, restoration evidence, and community stewardship into a publishable impact story — without leaving GainForest.
createNoDrafts: Your saved Cert drafts will appear here after you start editing.
createCoverHelp: A strong visual helps the Cert feel trustworthy and complete. The image is added only when you publish.
createSignInSites: Sign in to attach certified locations from your GainForest account. You can still draft the Cert locally before signing in.
createNoSites: No certified locations found yet. Publish this Cert now, or create site boundaries under
createPublishedDescription: Your Cert was published. It can take a moment to appear everywhere.
mapNoLocations: None of the items shown have a map location yet.
